Package org.eventb.core.seqprover

Class SequentProver

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.core.runtime.Plugin
org.eventb.core.seqprover.SequentProver
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.osgi.framework.BundleActivator
public class SequentProver extends org.eclipse.core.runtime.Plugin
The main plugin class to be used in the desktop.
Since:
1.0

      See Also:
      • IAutoTacticRegistry

    • checkAutoTactics

      public static org.eclipse.core.runtime.IStatus checkAutoTactics(boolean force, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)
      Checks that all externally provided auto tactics seem to work by running them on a trivial sequent. The result of the last run is persisted across platform restart, so that the check is not performed again for an external tactic that has already succeeded in the past. The result of the checks is provided as a MultiStatus, with one ITacticCheckStatus entry for each external auto tactic.
      Parameters:
      force - ignore the cache and check all tactics again
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting and cancellation are not desired.
      Returns:
      the results of the checks as a MultiStatus of ITacticCheckStatus
      Since:
      3.3

    • debugOut

      public static void debugOut(String message)
      Prints the given message to the console in case the debug flag is switched on
      Parameters:
      message - The message to print out to the console
